arts.ttl: 'Unsellable' Man Utd duo earning similar money to Tom Heaton as 'issues' arise
arts.sum: Manchester United are facing further problems behind the scenes, with the club said to be struggling to pay two talented stars enough money despite reserve goalkeeper Tom Heaton's hefty contract

arts.ttl: “Of course, I like” – Player pleased with Manchester United links for January transfer
arts.sum: Real Sociedad’s Luka Sučić is aware of the reports linking him with a move to Manchester United. The Croatia international took advantage of the winter break and made a trip to Bosnia and Herzegovina. Sportske Novosti had a chat with the 22-year-old on a few topics, including the recent reports linking him to Manchester United. The post “Of course, I like” – Player pleased with Manchester United links for January transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Manchester United prodigy Chido Obi-Martin pushing for senior Red Devils debut?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly planning when to hand teenage prodigy Chido Obi-Martin his senior debut for the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah overtakes Man Utd icon with landmark Liverpool assist
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah scored and set up two goals in Liverpool's 5-0 thrashing of West Ham on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'Seriously Interested' in Signing 'Extraordinary' Barcelona Star
arts.sum: Manchester United are showing ‘serious interest’ in Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'Seriously Interested' in Signing 'Extraordinary' Barcelona Star
arts.sum: Manchester United are showing ‘serious interest’ in Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Marcus Rashford saga will take another twist at Manchester United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was dropped from the Man Utd squad for the Manchester derby and hasn't returned to the fold.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 'should win at Old Trafford' as Man United prediction made
arts.sum: Newcastle United are on course to maintain their unbeaten run and sign off 2024 with an important result at Manchester United - according to the Premier League pundits. The Magpies face a Man United side struggling for form after their 2-0 defeat to Wolves on Boxing Day, a game which saw Bruno Fernandes sent off.

arts.ttl: Longstaff to Everton, Trippier exit back on and three other possible Newcastle United January deals
arts.sum: Last January Howe had to battle to hold on to Kieran Trippier as Bayern Munich swooped in with a bid for the right-back and with the head coach urging for focus within his squad he has made it clear there could be more interest in some of his squad. Some reports have even suggested that a deal with the Saudi Pro League side is already "done" but Howe has attempted to play down such talk and feels it would be dangerous to sell a keeper of Dubravka's quality and experience while Nick Pope is injured.

Manchester United fell to a third successive defeat when they came undone by an inspired Wolves side at Molineux on Boxing Day. Newcastle, meanwhile, made it four league victories in a row, with just...
